evals.prompt: Create a Linear issue for fixing the login bug on the staging environment
evals.expected_output: The skill searches for duplicate issues first, selects appropriate labels from the taxonomy, creates an issue with a description containing 'Why we need this' section, and uses el-linear create command
expectations: Searches for existing issues to avoid duplicates before creating
Selects labels from the known label taxonomy (e.g., bug)
Description includes a 'Why we need this' section
Uses el-linear CLI to create the issue, not raw curl

assertions.name: linear-operations
assertions.description: Issue creation must route through the Linear operations skill.
Duplicate checking runs before creating the issue.
The issue is created through el-linear.
The issue body includes the required intent section.

evals.expected_output: The skill uses el-linear search to find issues matching auth keywords
expectations: Uses el-linear search command with appropriate query
Does not attempt to use curl against api.linear.app
Returns formatted results with issue IDs and titles

assertions.name: linear-operations
assertions.description: Linear search should use the Linear operations skill.
Searches Linear with the requested auth query.
Does not bypass el-linear with raw Linear API calls.

evals.expected_output: The skill uses el-linear update to change the issue status
expectations: Uses el-linear update command with the issue identifier DEV-123
Sets the status to In Progress
Does not create a new issue

assertions.name: linear-operations
assertions.description: Issue mutation should use the Linear operations skill.
Updates DEV-123 to In Progress through el-linear.
Reads the existing issue before mutation.

evals.prompt: Create a git branch for DEV-456
evals.expected_output: This should NOT trigger linear-operations. Branch creation from Linear issues is handled by git-branch-from-linear skill.
expectations: No el-linear create or update commands are issued

assertions.name: linear-operations
assertions.description: Branch creation is outside linear-operations scope.

assertions.name: git-branch-from-linear
assertions.description: Branch creation should route to the branch skill.
Reading issue metadata is allowed for branch creation.
Does not create a new issue for branch creation.
Does not update issue fields for branch creation.
